About Me

Data Analyst with hands-on experience in data cleaning, data validation, exploratory data analysis (EDA), and building dashboards that support business reporting and decision-making. Proficient in Power BI (including DAX, time intelligence functions, drill down, slicers, and matrix tables), Oracle SQL (joins, aggregations, CTEs, window functions), and Python (Pandas) for end-to-end data workflows.


Gained real-world experience working with digital performance data using Google Analytics and SEMrush - supporting leadership with KPI tracking, trend analysis, and cross-functional collaboration across content, development, and operations teams.


Built multiple analytical projects across banking, retail, and automotive domains - working with datasets ranging from 3,900 to 50,000+ records - covering data modelling, KPI building, and delivering data-driven actionable solutions through structured Power BI dashboards and SQL-based analysis.
